reason: This video is an instructional/educational production about preparing for laparoscopic surgery (patient pre-operative education), not an FLS task performance. Content includes: title cards ('Preparing for Your Surgery', 'On the Night Before Your Surgery'), interviews with healthcare staff in library/clinical settings, patient preparation guidance (removing earrings, fasting instructions), hospital facility tours, procedural educational segments, and credits. No FLS trainer apparatus, no simulated surgical task performance, and no measurable technical skill execution visible. This is patient education material, not a trainee or expert performing an FLS MISTELS task.
